---
title: A semi-automated pipeline for morphological analysis of myonuclei along single muscle fibers
date: '2025-01-01'
author: [Esben T Schroeder, Helia G Megowan, Madeline Luu, Adam Shuaib, Adam C Fries, Jake Searcy, Hans C Dreyer]
publication: bioRxiv, _2025-12_ (2025).
categories: [health]
url_source: ''
url_preprint: 'https://biorxiv.org/lookup/doi/10.64898/2025.12.15.694446'
journ: bioRxiv
issue: null
page: "2025-12"
year: 2025
image: ''
pub_number: 19
---
